accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.

accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items.

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction (executive functioning): 100 minutes per week; 50 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.
Language processing support (group): 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Unassigned.

goals.text: Jamal will read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Reads grade-level text at 80 words per minute.
goals.source_quote: Jamal will read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy.

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.

goals.text: Sofia will produce /r/ in the initial position of words with 80% accuracy in structured tasks.
goals.target: 80% accuracy in structured tasks across three sessions.
goals.source_quote: Sofia will produce /r/ in the initial position of words with 80% accuracy in structured tasks.

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
